meaning: adj.市中心区的,位于市中心区的n.市中心区(商业区和住宅区的中间地)
examples: Now we were in Midtown, Saturday night, early April.
I ran into her last year on Madison Avenue in midtown.
Well-funded shoppers head to Midtown's Fifth Ave and the Upper East Side's Madison Ave.
In midtown, spaces that once belonged to the auto industry have found new life through the arts.
